text: Floor three stairwell has a missing handrail on the left side. Needs immediate attention.
Scaffolding on the east facade looks unstable. Two anchor points appear loose.
Workers on level two are not wearing high-vis vests. Reminded site manager.
Fire extinguisher in the basement corridor is expired. Replacement needed before next phase.
Emergency exit on ground floor is partially blocked by materials. Site team notified.
Electrical panel on floor two is unlabelled and unlocked. Flagged for site electrician.
Safety signage at the main entrance is faded and partially obscured. Recommend replacement.
Chemical storage in the basement has no ventilation and labels are missing. Urgent.
Drinking water station on floor one is empty. Workers using unverified tap water.
Crane operator confirmed load limits posted and visible. No issues observed.
